nodes.text: The honest economics of OnlyFans — what creators actually earn and what drives the gap.

OnlyFans has become one of the most financially significant tools for independent creators. In 2026, it hosts over 4 million creators and has paid out billions in creator earnings. The platform keeps 20%, and creators keep 80% — one of the best revenue share rates in the creator economy.
The median OnlyFans creator earns approximately $150–$300/month. The income distribution is highly skewed — top creators drive the vast majority of platform revenue.
What Drives the Biggest Income Gaps
Creators who actively drive traffic from TikTok, Instagram, X (Twitter), and Reddit significantly outperform those relying on OnlyFans discovery.
Strategic PPV messaging to existing subscribers is the highest-leverage earning tactic on the platform.
Lower subscription prices ($4.99–$9.99) drive more subscribers; higher prices ($20–$49.99) earn more per subscriber. Test both.
Higher-frequency, consistent creators retain subscribers better and reduce churn.
Estimate your subscription and PPV income based on your subscriber count and pricing.
Use our free calculator to estimate your potential income based on your numbers.
Free tool · No sign-up required · Instant results
Does OnlyFans work for non-adult creators?
Yes — fitness trainers, chefs, musicians, and educators all use OnlyFans successfully. The platform is not exclusively adult content, though adult creators currently dominate the top earner rankings.
Payments are processed via bank transfer, Paxum, or other supported methods. There's a 7–21 day pending period on new payments before they're available for withdrawal.
OnlyFans takes 20% of all creator earnings. Creators keep 80% — a higher share than YouTube (55%), Twitch (50%), or most other creator platforms.

OnlyFans offers one of the best creator revenue share rates in the industry at 80%. Success depends less on the platform itself and more on external promotion strategy, PPV execution, and consistent audience engagement. Use our calculator to model your income potential.
